<p>For High end luxury Real Estate Investors and Property Buyers this is an excellent opportunity to invest in Emaar Oasis Villas at Emirates Road Dubai. Now clients can take a virtual tour of the entire project without visiting the Sales office or experience center. Our Sales team can share all the information such as Floor Plans, Master layout design, Sample model residence villa tour, Booking details, Price & payment plans, Cost Sheet and price list – online. Our Business Advisor can arrange for an online meeting, presentation of properties for sale via online meeting platforms such as <a href="https://zoom.us/">Zoom</a>, Google Meet or <a href="https://www.microsoft.com/">Microsoft Teams</a>. Also we can schedule a phone call or <a href="https://web.whatsapp.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">WhatsApp</a> to share complete property details and we can close the sale transaction. Now investor can buy Villa and Row Houses properties in Dubai with Crypto Currency such as Bitcoin –BTC, <a href="https://ethereum.org/">Ethereum</a>-ETH, Lite Coin, Ripple and USDT. ( NOTE: Kindly check with the Sales Team about this mode of payment)</p>
<h6 style="font-weight: var(--h6_typography-font-weight); font-style: var(--h6_typography-font-style,normal); --fontSize: 16; line-height: 1.2; --minFontSize: 16;" data-fontsize="16" data-lineheight="19.2px" class="fusion-responsive-typography-calculated"><strong>Investor Golden Visa Opportunity in Dubai</strong></h6>
<p>In Dubai, the purchase of ready to move in real estate worth at least AED 750,000, investors can receive a visa for 3 years, and from April 2021, the Cabinet approved the revision of the visa system, and now with investments of AED 2,000,000, investors are entitled to a 10-year Golden Visa. As a result, once Emaar Arabian Ranches Villas is completed, you can immediately apply for a visa and bring your spouse and children to the UAE on a family sponsorship basis.</p>
<p>Buying a residential unit in Emaar May Villas residences, which evokes timeless elegance and exemplary design, is the perfect option for those who wish to live within close proximity to key landmarks and locations in Dubai and get access to premium benefits, among which include exclusive membership to a world-class golf course, dedicated chauffeur service and much more. You will always be able to resell a property or start renting it out and generate a stable income in case you change your plans.</p>
